overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a dimly lit gothic classroom or study hall from a video game, featuring stone arches, wall-mounted lanterns, and students sitting at wooden tables. The warm artificial lighting creates a moody, medieval atmosphere reminiscent of a historic castle interior.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a gothic classroom interior with stone arches and warm lantern lighting. Two students sit at wooden tables in the center and left areas, engaged in quiet study. The stone walls feature decorative circular windows and ribbed vaulting overhead, creating a moody medieval atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a gothic classroom that maintains a moody, medieval stillness throughout. It begins with a wide perspective of the interior, where warm lantern light casts soft glows against heavy stone arches and ribbed vaulting. The camera lingers on the quiet scene as two students remain focused on their work at wooden tables positioned in the center and left of the frame. The composition then emphasizes the architectural depth of the room, drawing attention to the decorative circular windows embedded in the stone walls. Finally, the scene settles into a heavy, scholarly silence, enveloping the students within the dim, historic confines of the study hall.
